sql: SELECT COUNT(user_id) FROM users
SELECT COUNT((user_id)) FROM users
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM users
SELECT APPROXIMATE COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM users
SELECT COUNT(MD5(user_id)) FROM users
description: 返るのは加工値の件数だけ

sql: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN user_id = 'u1' THEN 1 END) FROM users
description: 条件内利用でも返るのは件数

sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL) FROM users
SELECT COUNT_IF(user_id IS NOT NULL) FROM users
SELECT COUNT(user_id) OVER (PARTITION BY event_date) FROM events
SELECT name FROM users WHERE user_id = 'u1'
SELECT name FROM users WHERE user_id IN ('u1','u2')
SELECT name FROM users WHERE user_id BETWEEN 'a' AND 'z'
SELECT name FROM users WHERE user_id LIKE 'u%'
SELECT a.amount FROM sales a JOIN users b ON a.user_id = b.user_id
SELECT amount FROM sales JOIN users USING (user_id)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users GROUP BY user_id
SELECT status, COUNT(*) FROM users GROUP BY status HAVING MAX(user_id) > 'u0'
SELECT name FROM users ORDER BY user_id
SELECT DISTINCT name FROM users WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL
SELECT name FROM users QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY created_at) = 1
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY created_at) AS rn FROM users
description: IDはウィンドウ制御だけ

sql: SELECT RANK() OVER (ORDER BY user_id) AS rnk FROM users
SELECT LAG(name) OVER (ORDER BY user_id) FROM users
SELECT FIRST_VALUE(name) OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY created_at) FROM users
SELECT LISTAGG(name, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY user_id) FROM users
SELECT SUM(amount) FILTER (WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL) FROM users
SELECT user_id = 'u1' AS is_target FROM users
SELECT user_id IS NULL AS missing FROM users
SELECT user_id IN ('u1','u2') AS target FROM users
SELECT CASE WHEN user_id = 'u1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS flag FROM users
SELECT IF(user_id = 'u1', 1, 0) AS flag FROM users
SELECT DECODE(user_id, 'u1', 1, 0) AS flag FROM users
description: DECODEはCASEへ正規化され条件だけ

sql: SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM users u WHERE u.user_id = 'u1')
SELECT o.order_id FROM orders o WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM users u WHERE u.user_id = o.user_id)
WITH x AS (SELECT user_id, amount FROM users) SELECT SUM(amount) FROM x
description: CTEで取得しても最終出力しない

sql: WITH x AS (SELECT amount FROM users WHERE user_id = 'u1') SELECT * FROM x
WITH a AS (SELECT user_id, amount FROM users), b AS (SELECT amount FROM a WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL) SELECT SUM(amount) FROM b
WITH x AS (SELECT 1 AS user_id) SELECT user_id FROM x
description: 機微名の別名でも元値が定数なら許可

sql: WITH x AS (SELECT COUNT(user_id) AS user_id FROM users) SELECT user_id FROM x
description: 機微名でも中身は件数

sql: SELECT SUM(amount) FROM (SELECT user_id, amount FROM users) x
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT user_id FROM users) x
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(user_id) FROM users) AS n
description: スカラー副問合せの件数

sql: WITH x AS (SELECT amount, name FROM users WHERE user_id = 'u1') SELECT * FROM x
description: 派生表の安全列だけをSTAR展開

sql: WITH x AS (SELECT amount, name FROM users WHERE user_id = 'u1') SELECT x.* FROM x
SELECT name FROM users WHERE user_id='u1' UNION ALL SELECT name FROM old_users WHERE user_id='u2'
SELECT name FROM users WHERE user_id='u1' INTERSECT SELECT name FROM old_users WHERE user_id='u2'
SELECT name FROM users WHERE user_id='u1' EXCEPT SELECT name FROM old_users WHERE user_id='u2'
UPDATE users SET flag = 1 WHERE user_id = 'u1'
DELETE FROM users WHERE user_id = 'u1'
INSERT INTO archive(user_id) SELECT user_id FROM users
description: MCP結果セットには値を返さない

sql: CREATE TABLE archive AS SELECT user_id FROM users
description: 作成先へ保存するがLLMへ返さない

sql: EXPLAIN SELECT user_id FROM users
SELECT user_id INTO temp_users FROM users
UPDATE users SET flag=1 WHERE user_id='u1'; DELETE FROM old_users WHERE user_id='u2'
description: どちらも結果セットなし

sql: SELECT user_id FROM users
SELECT user_id AS uid FROM users
SELECT u.user_id FROM users u
SELECT "user_id" FROM users
SELECT USER_ID FROM users
SELECT CAST(user_id AS VARCHAR) FROM users
SELECT MD5(user_id) FROM users
SELECT SUBSTRING(user_id, 1, 3) FROM users
SELECT user_id || '-x' FROM users
SELECT COALESCE(user_id, 'unknown') FROM users
description: 代替値付きでも生値を含みうる

sql: SELECT NULLIF(user_id, 'u1') FROM users
SELECT user_id + 1 FROM users
SELECT MIN(user_id) FROM users
SELECT MAX(user_id) FROM users
SELECT LISTAGG(user_id, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY created_at) FROM users
SELECT ARRAY_AGG(user_id) FROM users
SELECT ANY_VALUE(user_id) FROM users
SELECT CASE WHEN status=1 THEN user_id ELSE NULL END FROM users
SELECT IF(status=1, user_id, NULL) FROM users
SELECT FIRST_VALUE(user_id) OVER (ORDER BY created_at) FROM users
description: ウィンドウ関数がIDを返す

sql: SELECT LAST_VALUE(user_id) OVER (ORDER BY created_at ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) FROM users
description: ウィンドウ関数がIDを返す

sql: SELECT LAG(user_id) OVER (ORDER BY created_at) FROM users
SELECT LEAD(user_id) OVER (ORDER BY created_at) FROM users
SELECT (SELECT user_id FROM users LIMIT 1) AS uid
description: スカラー副問合せがIDを返す

sql: WITH x AS (SELECT user_id FROM users) SELECT user_id FROM x
WITH x AS (SELECT user_id AS internal_key FROM users) SELECT internal_key FROM x
WITH a AS (SELECT user_id AS x FROM users), b AS (SELECT x AS y FROM a) SELECT y FROM b
WITH x(uid) AS (SELECT user_id FROM users) SELECT uid FROM x
SELECT x.uid FROM (SELECT user_id AS uid FROM users) x
SELECT x.uid FROM (SELECT user_id FROM users) AS x(uid)
SELECT name FROM users UNION ALL SELECT user_id FROM users
SELECT user_id FROM users UNION ALL SELECT user_id FROM old_users
WITH x AS (SELECT user_id, amount FROM users) SELECT * FROM x
WITH x AS (SELECT user_id, amount FROM users) SELECT x.* FROM x
SELECT * FROM users
SELECT u.* FROM users u
WITH x AS (SELECT * FROM users) SELECT user_id FROM x
description: 未展開STARから機微名を参照

sql: WITH x AS (SELECT * FROM users) SELECT * FROM x
description: 未展開STARが最終出力へ流れる

sql: UPDATE users SET flag=1 WHERE user_id='u1' RETURNING user_id
DELETE FROM users WHERE user_id='u1' RETURNING MD5(user_id)
UPDATE users SET flag=1 WHERE user_id='u1'; SELECT user_id FROM users
SELECT COUNT(user_id), COUNT(email) FROM users
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id), COUNT(DISTINCT email) FROM users
description: 両方とも重複除外件数

sql: SELECT name FROM users WHERE user_id='u1' AND email LIKE '%@example.com'
SELECT a.amount FROM a JOIN b ON a.user_id=b.user_id AND a.email=b.email
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users GROUP BY user_id, email
SELECT CASE WHEN user_id='u1' AND email='a@example.com' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM users
WITH x AS (SELECT user_id, email, amount FROM users) SELECT SUM(amount) FROM x
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT user_id, email FROM users) x
WITH x AS (SELECT name, amount FROM users WHERE user_id='u1' AND email IS NOT NULL) SELECT * FROM x
SELECT user_id, name FROM users WHERE email IS NOT NULL
SELECT email, name FROM users WHERE user_id='u1'
SELECT user_id, email FROM users
SELECT MD5(user_id), LOWER(email) FROM users
SELECT CASE WHEN status=1 THEN user_id ELSE email END FROM users
WITH x AS (SELECT user_id AS k, email AS m FROM users) SELECT k, m FROM x
WITH a AS (SELECT user_id AS x, email AS y FROM users), b AS (SELECT x AS p, y AS q FROM a) SELECT p, q FROM b
SELECT user_id FROM users UNION ALL SELECT email FROM users
WITH x AS (SELECT user_id, email, amount FROM users) SELECT * FROM x
UPDATE users SET flag=1 RETURNING user_id, email
SELECT COUNT(user_id), email FROM users GROUP BY email
SELECT COUNT(email), SUBSTRING(user_id,1,2) FROM users
WITH x AS (SELECT user_id, email FROM users) SELECT COUNT(user_id), email FROM x GROUP BY email
